targets.notes: Company goal to cut combined Scope 1, 2, and 3 absolute greenhouse gas emissions by 2030 from a 2019 baseline; not identified as an SBTi-approved target.
targets.title: 50% absolute reduction in Scope 1, 2, and 3 GHG emissions by 2030 vs 2019

targets.notes: Corporate net-zero goal across Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions by 2030; not identified as an SBTi-approved target.
targets.title: Net-zero greenhouse gas emissions across operations and value chain by 2030

targets.boundary: Global data centers and office campuses
targets.notes: Operational target to match electricity demand with carbon-free energy on a 24/7 basis by 2030, primarily affecting Scope 2 emissions; not identified as an SBTi-approved target.
targets.title: 24/7 carbon-free energy for data centers and offices by 2030
